name: ppt-executive-briefing
description: PowerPoint skills for executive summaries, pitch decks, boardroom decks, abstracts, and decision-ready briefings.

interface.shortDescription: Concise executive, pitch, boardroom, and abstract decks.
interface.longDescription: PPT Executive Briefing provides skills for short, high-signal PowerPoint decks. It emphasizes Pyramid Principle storylines, decision-first headlines, boardroom-ready summaries, investor/pitch narrative rhythm, clean charts, strong hierarchy, and artifact-tool PowerPoint production through the Presentations plugin.
